description: 50 real public projects for the LocalAIFactory structural benchmark (C#/SQL/Python fully supported; others reported as gaps).

repos.expectedCapability: C# symbols (classes/records/methods) + EF Core entity/DbContext detection + any embedded SQL bridge
repos.expectedGap: TS/JS/Razor front-end assets not structurally extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage
repos.notes: Microsoft reference .NET microservices/Aspire eShop sample. Good full-extract C# target.

repos.expectedCapability: C# symbols + EF Core DbContext/entity bridge; clean-architecture layering
repos.expectedGap: Razor/JS assets not structurally extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage
repos.notes: Microsoft ASP.NET Core monolith reference app. Small and fast.

repos.expectedCapability: C# symbols across modular CMS; EF/YesSql data layer bridge
repos.expectedGap: Front-end JS/Liquid templates not structurally extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; large repo may hit maxFilesToAnalyze cap
repos.notes: Modular .NET Core CMS. Large C# surface.

repos.expectedCapability: C# domain/service symbols + LinqToDB/SQL data-layer bridge
repos.expectedGap: Razor/JS storefront not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; develop branch default
repos.notes: Mature ASP.NET Core ecommerce platform with heavy SQL. License nopCommerce Public License - verify before reuse.

repos.expectedCapability: C# framework symbols + EF Core/module data bridge
repos.expectedGap: Angular/TS client packages not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; cap will truncate analysis
repos.notes: ABP application framework. Default branch dev. xlarge - cap reduced to 1500.

repos.expectedCapability: C# BCL symbol extraction (partial sample within cap)
repos.expectedGap: Native C/C++/asm runtime not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; only a small slice analyzed under cap
repos.notes: .NET runtime + libraries. Massive monorepo - stress test for cap/timeout handling.

repos.expectedCapability: C# framework symbols across hosting/MVC/Kestrel (partial under cap)
repos.expectedGap: TS/JS (SignalR, Blazor JS interop) not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; cap truncates
repos.notes: ASP.NET Core framework. xlarge.

repos.expectedCapability: C# server symbols + EF Core data bridge
repos.expectedGap: Web client JS not in repo/excluded -> minimal gap; default branch master
repos.notes: Self-hosted media server in C#. Default branch master.

repos.expectedCapability: C# symbols + EF Core store bridge for OAuth/OIDC server
repos.expectedGap: Minimal non-C#; near-complete extraction expected. Default branch dev
repos.notes: OpenIddict OAuth2/OIDC stack. Almost pure C#. Default branch dev.

repos.expectedCapability: C# engine/cmdlet symbol extraction
repos.expectedGap: PowerShell scripts and native bits not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; default branch master
repos.notes: PowerShell Core. Large C# codebase. Default branch master.

repos.expectedCapability: C# symbols + EF Core DbContext bridge; clean-architecture layer mapping
repos.expectedGap: Angular/TS SPA not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage
repos.notes: Jason Taylor clean-architecture template. Tiny, fast, ideal smoke/full target.

repos.expectedCapability: Python classes/functions; ORM model symbol extraction
repos.expectedGap: Admin JS/templates not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage
repos.notes: Django web framework. Large Python ORM surface.

repos.expectedCapability: Python classes/functions; Pydantic model + route symbol extraction
repos.expectedGap: Docs/markdown not code; minimal gap. Default branch master
repos.notes: FastAPI framework. Default branch master. Heavy docs but Python-clean.

repos.expectedCapability: Python classes/functions extraction across the framework
repos.expectedGap: Minimal; near-complete Python extraction expected
repos.notes: Flask microframework. Small, clean Python. Good smoke target.

repos.expectedCapability: Python DAG/operator class + function symbol extraction (partial under cap)
repos.expectedGap: React/TS UI not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; cap truncates
repos.notes: Apache Airflow orchestration platform. xlarge - cap 1500.

repos.expectedCapability: Python module/plugin class + function extraction
repos.expectedGap: PowerShell/shell modules not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage; default branch devel
repos.notes: Ansible automation engine. Default branch devel.

repos.expectedCapability: Python spider/middleware class + function extraction
repos.expectedGap: Minimal; near-complete Python extraction. Default branch master
repos.notes: Scrapy crawling framework. Small Python. Default branch master. Good smoke target.

repos.expectedCapability: Python class/function extraction across the data library
repos.expectedGap: Cython/.pyx and C extensions not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage
repos.notes: pandas data-analysis library. Significant Cython gap.

repos.expectedCapability: Python estimator class + function extraction
repos.expectedGap: Cython/.pyx compiled cores not extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage

repos.expectedCapability: Python task/worker class + function extraction

repos.expectedCapability: Python integration class + function extraction (partial under cap)
repos.expectedGap: Huge integration count truncated by cap; default branch dev
repos.notes: Home Assistant core. xlarge, almost pure Python. Default branch dev. Cap 1500.

repos.expectedCapability: Clone + file count + LOC tally only
repos.expectedGap: TS not structurally extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage / ValidationOnly (no symbols)
repos.notes: TypeScript compiler. Pure-TS - validation-only gap demonstrator. Large test corpus inflates files.
